candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Non-current assets, not current assets; not a match.
Balancing line, not total current assets.

variables.notes: Selected exact reported total current assets line from Balance Sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line with populated values across years; best match for CHE.
Also an exact semantic match and appears in older year(s); useful alternate label across periods.

candidates.row_label: Including restricted cash for jackpot liabilities
candidates.why: Subset/disclosure line, not total cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow line, not balance sheet; useful cross-check but not preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at start of period
candidates.why: Cash flow opening balance, not the balance-sheet cash line.

variables.notes: Both balance-sheet labels are exact matches and likely reflect label variation over time; priority given to the consistently populated lowercase version.

candidates.why: Exact total for current liabilities; directly matches LCT definition.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component/balancing line, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Component of non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line, not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected exact balance-sheet total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Exact semantic match for short-term debt/current borrowings; preferred for STD. Row is present even though preview values are blank.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit short-term debt line. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' and capital lease maturity rows per rule to exclude leases from STD.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.

variables.notes: Exact balance-sheet current tax payable line.

candidates.why: Exact total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred over gross/depreciation components.
Gross component of tangible assets, but not the preferred total/net PPE line.
Lease-related gross component; not preferred and may overlap with lease assets.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr/Imp Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation contra-asset, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr/Imp PPE under Capital Lease
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation contra-asset, not PPE total.
Cash flow capex line, not a balance-sheet PPE stock measure.

variables.notes: Used the reported balance-sheet PPE total/net line, which is preferred for PPEGT.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; direct match for AT.

variables.notes: Exact balance-sheet total assets line selected.

candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow measure.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash from Operating Activities - Balancing Value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not preferred when a clean reported operating cash flow line exists.

variables.notes: Selected the final operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
